About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long LINC dominates today's ranking at position #1 with an exceptional 96.0 score, driven by extraordinary long-term momentum across all timeframes—particularly its 1,293.61% 10-year return and 483.17% 5-year return, which vastly outpace SPY's equivalent periods (1,073.93% and 419.66% respectively). The stock exhibits textbook momentum confirmation with all four SMA conditions met, a "clean" momentum signal at 0.98, and a strong "strong_buy" flag, though its elevated volatility ratio of 1.925 suggests the gains come with considerable price swings. CF ranks second with a 127.06 price but shows notably weaker relative performance, underperforming SPY over the 10-year period by 189.81% when compared to QQQ, indicating sector-specific or cyclical headwinds despite its 256.51% absolute 10-year return. LINC's correlation pattern reveals concentrated exposure to materials (XLB at 0.322) and industrials (XLI at 0.282), suggesting its outperformance is tied to specific cyclical or commodity-driven secular trends rather than broad market strength.
